character_dossiers.name: Captain Smollett
character_dossiers.biography: A naval officer leading a ship's crew, involved in planning and decision-making with Dr. Livesey and the squire.

character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: A physician who smokes a pipe and participates in crew discussions, communicates plans to others.

character_dossiers.name: the squire
character_dossiers.biography: A landowner who admits fault and collaborates with the captain and doctor on crew strategy.

character_dossiers.name: Mr. Trelawney
character_dossiers.biography: A wealthy gentleman described as openhanded, involved in crew decisions.

character_dossiers.name: Long John
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member who leads cheers and engages in dialogue with the captain.

character_dossiers.name: Jim Hawkins
character_dossiers.biography: A young narrator who reports Silver's conversation and seeks to inform the crew.

character_dossiers.name: Job Anderson
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member ordered by the captain to execute a task.

character_dossiers.name: Hands
character_dossiers.biography: A crew member described as part of the loyal group, mentioned in strategic discussions.

character_dossiers.name: Silver
character_dossiers.biography: A man described as remarkable, central to the crew's mutiny plot.
